sections.heading: What is a BMI Calculator?
sections.content:
A BMI Calculator (Body Mass Index Calculator) is a health tool that measures body fat based on height and weight. It gives you a BMI score that falls into categories such as underweight, normal, overweight, or obese.

Our free online BMI Calculator supports both kg & cm and lbs & inches, making it useful worldwide (USA, UK, India, Pakistan, Canada, Australia, etc.).

sections.heading: BMI Definition and Calculation
sections.content:
BMI is calculated using height and weight.

Formula (Metric): BMI = Weight (kg) ÷ Height (m)²
Formula (Imperial): BMI = (Weight (lbs) × 703) ÷ Height (in)²

sections.heading: How to Calculate BMI Online (Step-by-Step Guide)
sections.content: Steps to calculate BMI using our free online calculator:

subSections.heading: Step 1
subSections.content: Choose your measurement unit: kg/cm or lbs/inches.

subSections.heading: Step 2
subSections.content: Enter your weight in kilograms or pounds.

subSections.heading: Step 3
subSections.content: Enter your height in centimeters or inches.

subSections.heading: Step 4
subSections.content: Select age & gender (optional) for better insights.

subSections.heading: Step 5
subSections.content: Click Calculate BMI → Instantly see your BMI score and category.

faq.a: A BMI Calculator measures your body mass index, showing if your weight is healthy for your height.

faq.q: What is the normal BMI range?
faq.a: According to WHO, a normal BMI is 18.5 to 24.9.
BMI is a good screening tool but may not be accurate for athletes, pregnant women, or seniors.

faq.q: How do I calculate BMI manually?
faq.a: Use the formula: Weight (kg) ÷ Height (m²) or Weight (lbs) × 703 ÷ Height (in²).

faq.q: Can I use BMI Calculator for children?
faq.a: Yes, BMI percentile charts are used for kids and teenagers.
Yes, it’s a free online tool available worldwide.

faq.a: Our BMI Calculator is accurate, globally compatible, and provides health tips, making it one of the best options in 2025.
